Known unsafe or profile-incompatible contract for cloud-enrollment-authority.
Known unsafe or profile-incompatible contract for broad-lan-route-advertisement.
Residual shared topology, bootstrap, storage, backup, observability, and lifecycle runtime contract; identity ownership is kit-specific.
Deterministic target-neutral OS-hardening policy generated once for every managed StackKit node; access and network controls remain delegated.
Residual Home-site admission, local ingress, autonomy, and backup runtime contract for an already supplied host; device authority is separately owned.
Generation-only Home enrollment and credential-authority policy; credential material, endpoints, and runtime enforcement are excluded.
Generation-only Basement identity verifier and trust policy; runtime enforcement and credential material are excluded.
Generation-only Home-site offline-autonomy policy; runtime and air-gapped installation enforcement remain separate claims.
Generation-only Home local-ingress and LAN access policy; discovery and runtime enforcement remain separate claims.
Generation-only explicit Home LAN discovery policy; empty intent emits no advertisements and runtime publication remains separately verified.
Residual Cloud-host admission, host-local firewall/hardening, and public edge/DNS/TLS intent for an already supplied host; identity authority is separately owned.
Generation-only Cloud identity trust policy with external device authority and Cloud-local verification; no device issuance or enrollment is owned.
Residual Basement-only Compose rollout owner; concrete foundation helpers lower independently beneath it.
Basement node-local Docker API isolation proxy backed by one explicitly approved daemon socket.
Immich photo service contract bound to the control-authority site and its personal-data primary.
